source_text: Since version 1.5, A+B/2-corrected \lfloor 1 4 \rfloor dipole velocity rotatory strengths are computed by default in sTDA calculations. Large parts of the code make use of OpenMP paral- lelization and the Intel MKL, thus setting the environmental variables OMP_NUM_THREADS and MKL_NUM_THREADS to the number of available CPUs may accelerate the calculations. With version 1.6, the std2 program is able to compute linear and quadratic response functions[15] to evaluate dynamic (hyper)polarizabilities and excited-state absorption spectra[16].

spans.content: Since version 1.5, A+B/2-corrected
\lfloor 1 4 \rfloor
dipole velocity rotatory strengths are computed
by default in sTDA calculations. Large parts of the code make use of OpenMP paral-
lelization and the Intel MKL, thus setting the environmental variables OMP_NUM_THREADS
and MKL_NUM_THREADS to the number of available CPUs may accelerate the calculations.
With version 1.6, the std2 program is able to compute linear and quadratic response
functions[15] to evaluate dynamic (hyper)polarizabilities and excited-state absorption
spectra[16].

protected_source_text: Since version 1.5, A+B/2-corrected [[FORMULA_1]] dipole velocity rotatory strengths are computed by default in sTDA calculations. Large parts of the code make use of OpenMP paral- lelization and the Intel MKL, thus setting the environmental variables OMP_NUM_THREADS and MKL_NUM_THREADS to the number of available CPUs may accelerate the calculations. With version 1.6, the std2 program is able to compute linear and quadratic response functions[15] to evaluate dynamic (hyper)polarizabilities and excited-state absorption spectra[16].
protected_translated_text: 自版本1.5起，sTDA计算默认计算A+B/2校正的[[FORMULA_1]]偶极速度旋转强度。代码大部分利用OpenMP并行化和Intel MKL，因此将环境变量OMP_NUM_THREADS和MKL_NUM_THREADS设置为可用CPU数量可加速计算。从版本1.6开始，std2程序能够计算线性和二次响应函数[15]，以评估动态（超）极化率和激发态吸收光谱[16]。
translated_text: 自版本1.5起，sTDA计算默认计算A+B/2校正的\lfloor 1 4 \rfloor偶极速度旋转强度。代码大部分利用OpenMP并行化和Intel MKL，因此将环境变量OMP_NUM_THREADS和MKL_NUM_THREADS设置为可用CPU数量可加速计算。从版本1.6开始，std2程序能够计算线性和二次响应函数[15]，以评估动态（超）极化率和激发态吸收光谱[16]。

source_text: Since version 1.6.1, a spin-flip version of the sTD-DFT (SF-sTD-DFT) method is imple- mented[17] as well as the natural transition orbital analysis [18].

spans.content: Since version 1.6.1, a spin-flip version of the sTD-DFT (SF-sTD-DFT) method is imple-
mented[17] as well as the natural transition orbital analysis [18].

protected_source_text: Since version 1.6.1, a spin-flip version of the sTD-DFT (SF-sTD-DFT) method is imple- mented[17] as well as the natural transition orbital analysis [18].
protected_translated_text: 自版本1.6.1起，实现了sTD-DFT的自旋翻转版本（SF-sTD-DFT）方法[17]以及自然跃迁轨道分析[18]。
translated_text: 自版本1.6.1起，实现了sTD-DFT的自旋翻转版本（SF-sTD-DFT）方法[17]以及自然跃迁轨道分析[18]。

source_text: With version 1.6.2, molecular optical rotations can be computed at the sTD-DFT level [19] and the whole linear and quadratic responses deck was speeded-up.

spans.content: With version 1.6.2, molecular optical rotations can be computed at the sTD-DFT level [19]
and the whole linear and quadratic responses deck was speeded-up.

protected_source_text: With version 1.6.2, molecular optical rotations can be computed at the sTD-DFT level [19] and the whole linear and quadratic responses deck was speeded-up.
protected_translated_text: 从版本1.6.2开始，可以在sTD-DFT水平计算分子光学旋转[19]，并且整个线性和二次响应模块得到了加速。
translated_text: 从版本1.6.2开始，可以在sTD-DFT水平计算分子光学旋转[19]，并且整个线性和二次响应模块得到了加速。

source_text: In version 1.6.3, we are able to compute two-photon absorption cross-sections[20], to in- terpret molecular response properties using the RespA approach[21], and a dual-threshold scheme is also available to treat efficiently very large systems with a central chromphore [22]. With version 2.0.0, a major update happened with the availability of both XsTD-DFT and XsTDA methods that no longer use semi-empirical integrals. The std2 program is also interfaced natively with the libcint integral library [23] to compute one- and two- electron integrals. Range-separated hybrid functionals are also available natively with XsTD-DFT and XsTDA schemes.

spans.content: In version 1.6.3, we are able to compute two-photon absorption cross-sections[20], to in-
terpret molecular response properties using the RespA approach[21], and a dual-threshold
scheme is also available to treat efficiently very large systems with a central chromphore [22].
With version 2.0.0, a major update happened with the availability of both XsTD-DFT
and XsTDA methods that no longer use semi-empirical integrals. The std2 program is
also interfaced natively with the libcint integral library [23] to compute one- and two-
electron integrals. Range-separated hybrid functionals are also available natively with
XsTD-DFT and XsTDA schemes.

protected_source_text: In version 1.6.3, we are able to compute two-photon absorption cross-sections[20], to in- terpret molecular response properties using the RespA approach[21], and a dual-threshold scheme is also available to treat efficiently very large systems with a central chromphore [22]. With version 2.0.0, a major update happened with the availability of both XsTD-DFT and XsTDA methods that no longer use semi-empirical integrals. The std2 program is also interfaced natively with the libcint integral library [23] to compute one- and two- electron integrals. Range-separated hybrid functionals are also available natively with XsTD-DFT and XsTDA schemes.
protected_translated_text: 在版本1.6.3中，我们能够计算双光子吸收截面[20]，使用RespA方法解释分子响应性质[21]，并且还提供了一种双阈值方案，用于高效处理具有中心发色团的超大型体系[22]。随着版本2.0.0的发布，主要更新包括引入了XsTD-DFT和XsTDA方法，这些方法不再使用半经验积分。std2程序还与libcint积分库[23]原生接口，用于计算单电子和双电子积分。范围分离杂化泛函也原生支持XsTD-DFT和XsTDA方案。
translated_text: 在版本1.6.3中，我们能够计算双光子吸收截面[20]，使用RespA方法解释分子响应性质[21]，并且还提供了一种双阈值方案，用于高效处理具有中心发色团的超大型体系[22]。随着版本2.0.0的发布，主要更新包括引入了XsTD-DFT和XsTDA方法，这些方法不再使用半经验积分。std2程序还与libcint积分库[23]原生接口，用于计算单电子和双电子积分。范围分离杂化泛函也原生支持XsTD-DFT和XsTDA方案。

source_text: In the following, a short outline of the theory will be given followed by a documentation on the program.

on the program.

protected_source_text: In the following, a short outline of the theory will be given followed by a documentation on the program.
protected_translated_text: 接下来将简要概述理论，随后提供程序文档。
translated_text: 接下来将简要概述理论，随后提供程序文档。

spans.content: 2 Theoretical background

source_text: To compute excited states via std2 (Sec. 2.1) or sTD-DFT (Sec. 2.2), a ground state Kohn-Sham (or Hartree-Fock) calculation needs to be carried out with one of the pro- grams mentioned above. The orbitals obtained from this calculation are then used in the sTDA/sTD-DFT procedure. Instead of a Kohn-Sham reference, the orbitals may be obtained via the semi-empirical extended tight-binding (xTB) scheme (see Sec. 7).

spans.content: To compute excited states via std2 (Sec. 2.1) or sTD-DFT (Sec. 2.2), a ground state
Kohn-Sham (or Hartree-Fock) calculation needs to be carried out with one of the pro-
grams mentioned above. The orbitals obtained from this calculation are then used in
the sTDA/sTD-DFT procedure. Instead of a Kohn-Sham reference, the orbitals may be
obtained via the semi-empirical extended tight-binding (xTB) scheme (see Sec. 7).

protected_source_text: To compute excited states via std2 (Sec. 2.1) or sTD-DFT (Sec. 2.2), a ground state Kohn-Sham (or Hartree-Fock) calculation needs to be carried out with one of the pro- grams mentioned above. The orbitals obtained from this calculation are then used in the sTDA/sTD-DFT procedure. Instead of a Kohn-Sham reference, the orbitals may be obtained via the semi-empirical extended tight-binding (xTB) scheme (see Sec. 7).
protected_translated_text: 要通过std2（第2.1节）或sTD-DFT（第2.2节）计算激发态，需要使用上述提到的程序之一进行基态Kohn-Sham（或Hartree-Fock）计算。该计算获得的轨道随后用于sTDA/sTD-DFT过程。除了Kohn-Sham参考外，轨道也可以通过半经验扩展紧束缚（xTB）方案获得（参见第7节）。
translated_text: 要通过std2（第2.1节）或sTD-DFT（第2.2节）计算激发态，需要使用上述提到的程序之一进行基态Kohn-Sham（或Hartree-Fock）计算。该计算获得的轨道随后用于sTDA/sTD-DFT过程。除了Kohn-Sham参考外，轨道也可以通过半经验扩展紧束缚（xTB）方案获得（参见第7节）。
